codeReview.summary: The vector-store CRUD/search/list and file CRUD/content/polling surface mostly matches the requested contract, but the upload helpers violate the SDK's local-validation invariant by performing a real file upload before validating the target vector-store id.

issues.description: `VectorStoreFiles::upload` calls `Files::create(...)` at lines 361-365 before any `validate_path_id("vector_store_id", ...)` check, then only validates the vector-store id indirectly when `self.create(...)` runs. A blank/invalid `vector_store_id` therefore uploads a new assistants-purpose file and only then returns a local validation error, leaving an orphaned file and causing side effects for a request that the architecture says should fail locally on deterministic blank path identifiers. `upload_and_poll` inherits the same bug because it delegates to `upload` first.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, sdk-surface-worker procedure, and commit 84a253c. The family wiring, beta-header routing, typed list/search semantics, and polling behavior are present, but the review fails because the vector-store upload helpers can mutate remote state before rejecting an invalid vector-store id.
